response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience in software development, open-source contributions, and technical leadership across diverse domains. While his background aligns well with the technical and architectural requirements of the role, his leadership experience is more hands-on and project-focused rather than executive-level team management, and his German proficiency is limited.
strengths: Strong technical expertise in full-stack development, open-source technologies, and Linux/Unix environments, with notable contributions to GIS and event-driven platforms.
Proven ability to design and architect complex systems, including microservices, real-time data processing, and developer tooling, aligning with UML and modeling requirements.
Demonstrated mentorship and knowledge-sharing through workshops, talks, and open-source projects, indicating strong communication and collaborative skills.
concerns: Limited explicit experience in executive-level leadership or strategic oversight of interdisciplinary teams, which is critical for the Head of Development role.
German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic,' falling short of the required C1 level for client-facing and operational leadership.
While project management is mentioned, there is no clear evidence of formal experience in IT security, risk management, or compliance considerations.
